MAP.COMMENT: Get the cache manager and cache name
Forming the key the fetch the value from cache
Get the configuration from the cache

BRANCH.COMMENT: check to see whether file already read

SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: file not yet read, read file

BRANCH.COMMENT: check config entry present or not

Values.value: Unable to get data from cache. cacheManagerName: %cacheManagerName% cacheName: %cacheName% key: %finalKey%

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: Do nothing, entry not present in config file
